<!--
Thanks for opening a pull request!

Please make sure you have:
  - read CONTRIBUTING.md
  - opened/linked an issue for non-trivial changes
  - run `make lint` and `make test`
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Plugin contribution (new built-in plugin or improvement)
- [ ] Signature pack contribution (new/updated YAML signatures)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] My code passes tests (`make test` passes)
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated the docs where appropriate
- [ ] I have added a CHANGELOG entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commit subjects follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] For breaking changes: an ADR is included under `docs/adr/`

## How was this tested?

<!-- Be specific. "Tested locally" is not enough. Include test commands,
fixtures, target URLs (if public), or screenshots. -->

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know that isn't obvious from the diff. -->
